title: Moony's Machetes
description: A simple vanilla-style resource pack that turns vanilla swords into machetes.
body:
A simple vanilla-style 16x resource pack that turns all the vanilla swords into machetes. Great for the post-apocalypse, the wild west, or any other setting where it makes more sense to have a machete than a sword.

Feel free to use as a base for modded swords, just credit me in the .mcmeta file.
